title: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: National Institute of Technology Durgapur (NIT Durgapur) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: M.E/M.Tech in Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology/Biotechnology/Nanotechnology/Mechanical Engg/Biochemistry/Environmental Engg/Bioprocess Engg/Microbiology or allied subject with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks from any recognized Institute/University. M.Sc. in Biotechnology / Chemistry / Environmental Science / Microbiology with valid NET/GATE score and with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks from any recognized Institute/University. Any other National level examinations conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their agencies and institutions such as DST, DBT, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. will also be considered. Working experience in the field of membrane-driven wastewater treatment technology or related field with publications is preferable. NET/GATE candidate will be preferred. Selected candidate must register for PhD program under this project. M.Tech/M.Sc pursuing students belonging to the aforementioned discipline in the year 2026 may apply.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA - Rs. 42,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA - Rs. 42,000/- + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Durgapur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Durgapur is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.E/M.Tech or M.Sc with NET/GATE qualification in relevant disciplines as specified in the notification. Please refer to the detailed eligibility criteria for exact requirements.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 37,000/- + HRA to Rs. 42,000/- + HRA per month, depending on the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Junior Research Fellow in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply for this position by sending their complete application via email.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract-based job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job, and the position is purely temporary.

faq.question: Q9. Does NIT Durgapur offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for further information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NIT Durgapur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
